evals.name: build-fintech-annual-plan
evals.prompt: Build a 12-month marketing plan for our B2B fintech. Series B, $20M ARR, mid-market finance teams ($50M-$500M revenue). Objectives: grow ARR 50% to $30M, reduce CAC payback from 18mo to <14mo, lift NPS from 42 to 52. Budget envelope $2.5M.
expected_assertions: Should run scripts/build_plan.py with all inputs
Should produce 4 parts in strict order (Analysis → Strategy → Mix → Results)
Should include CONSTRAINT HEADER at top of each section showing sales target + $2.5M budget
Should include Part 2 Strategy 5 sub-sections in correct order
Should ensure Part 4 metrics mirror Part 2 objectives (NRR / CAC payback / NPS)
Should include anti-plan + kill criteria + decision gates
Should NOT produce a plan that starts with tactics or skips Analysis

evals.name: validate-bad-plan
evals.prompt: Audit this draft plan: '## Q3 Plan: Run a paid social campaign targeting mid-market companies. Goal: 15% pipeline growth. Budget: $200K. KPIs: impressions, CTR, CPL.' Is this a real plan?
expected_assertions: Should identify this is NOT a 4-part plan structure
Should flag missing Part 1 Analysis (no 5Cs, no SWOT)
Should flag missing Part 2 Strategy structure (no 5 strategy sub-sections)
Should flag KPIs are activity metrics not impact metrics
Should flag 'mid-market companies' as too-broad target segment
Should suggest building plan from scratch using full 4-part structure
Should NOT validate this as acceptable

evals.name: single-part-strategy-only
evals.prompt: Just give me Part 2 Strategy section template. We're a SaaS HR startup, $12M ARR, focused on remote-first companies. Objective: 50K MAU year 1, retention >70%.
expected_assertions: Should generate ONLY Part 2 Strategy template (not full plan)
Should include all 5 strategy sub-sections in correct order: Financial / Non-financial / Customer / Target segment / Positioning
Should suggest running customer-segmentation-canvas + positioning-statement-builder for Target Segment + Positioning sections
